Question:
We will plan to perform a weighted Cox regression for NHANES data from 2005-2018.
Participants will be excluded if have missing data on any of the following: fasting plasma glucose (mmol/L) or glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%) or months follow up examination or mortality status or age at screening was less than 20 years old.
They will also be excluded if they don't have diabetes or prediabetes when they are defined as the following:
diabetes defined as meeting any of these: glycohemoglobin (%)>=6.5 or fasting plasma glucose >=126 mg/dl, doctor told you have diabetes yes or taking inculin now yes.
prediabtes defined as meeting any of these: glycohemoglobin (%) >=5.7 less or equal to 6.4 fasting plasma glucose level between 100-125 mg/dl or yes to do you have prediabetes.
Main predictor is SHR - which is fasting plasma glucose (mmol/l)/ (1.59* glycohemoglobin (%)-2.59), categorized as quartiles, categorized in quartiles(%) Q1: <=25, Q2: >25 and <=50, Q3: >50 and <=75, Q4: >75.
The analysis will employ a weighted Cox proportional hazards regression model and covariates will include age at screening, gender, race/Hispanic origin.
The main outcome is all-cause mortality with months followup examination serving as the time-to-event variable.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: weighted cox regression

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 2005-2018

Inclusion Criteria:
None

Exclusion Criteria:
- missing fasting plasma glucose (mmol/L)
- missing glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%)
- missing months follow up examination
- missing mortality status
- age at screening < 20 years old
- NOT (diabetes OR prediabetes) where:
  diabetes is defined as:
    glycohemoglobin (%) >= 6.5 OR fasting plasma glucose >= 126 mg/dl OR doctor told you have diabetes = yes OR taking inculin now = yes
  prediabetes is defined as:
    (glycohemoglobin (%) >= 5.7 AND glycohemoglobin (%) <= 6.4) OR (fasting plasma glucose level >= 100 mg/dl AND fasting plasma glucose level <= 125 mg/dl) OR do you have prediabetes = yes

Covariates:
- age at screening
- gender
- race/Hispanic origin

Predictor:
- SHR calculated as:
  fasting plasma glucose (mmol/l) / (1.59 * glycohemoglobin (%) - 2.59)
  categorized into quartiles:
    Q1: <=25%
    Q2: >25% and <=50%
    Q3: >50% and <=75%
    Q4: >75%

Outcome:
- time-to-event: months follow up examination
- event indicator: all-cause mortality (1 for event, 0 for censored)

-- STEP 1: Create temp_master_weight

-- TEMP TABLE FOR weight
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_weight;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_weight AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_d
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_e
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_f
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_g
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_h
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_i
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_j
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL;


-- STEP 2: Create temp_psu_stratum

-- TEMP TABLE FOR PSU and Stratum
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_psu_stratum;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_psu_stratum AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_i
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_j;


-- STEP 3: Create final weight+design table
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS weight_design;
CREATE TABLE weight_design AS
SELECT 
    s.respondent_sequence_number,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_stratum,
    w.survey_weight
FROM temp_psu_stratum s
INNER JOIN temp_master_weight w
  ON s.respondent_sequence_number = w.respondent_sequence_number;

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."fasting_glucose_mmol_l",
    t1."glycohemoglobin",
    t2."months_followup_examination",
    t3."mortality_status",
    t4."age_in_years_at_screening",
    t5."fasting_glucose_mg_dl",
    t6."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t7."taking_insulin_now",
    t8."ever_told_you_have_prediabetes",
    t9."gender",
    t10."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_fasting_glucose_mmol_l t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_glycohemoglobin t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_months_followup_examination t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_mortality_status t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_fasting_glucose_mg_dl t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t6 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t6.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_taking_insulin_now t7 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t7.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_ever_told_you_have_prediabetes t8 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t8.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_gender t9 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t9.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_race_hispanic_origin t10 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t10.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);


-- Clean up final_master_table
DELETE FROM final_master_table
WHERE respondent_sequence_number NOT IN (
    SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM weight_design
);


-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes all patients from final_master_table as no specific inclusion criteria were provided.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table;

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude patients with missing fasting plasma glucose (mmol/l)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."fasting_glucose_mmol_l" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude patients with missing glycohemoglobin (%)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."glycohemoglobin" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude patients with missing months follow up examination
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."months_followup_examination" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude patients with missing mortality status
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."mortality_status" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.5: Exclude patients where age at screening was less than 20 years old
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step5 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_in_years_at_screening" >= 20;

-- STEP 2.6: Exclude patients who do not have diabetes or prediabetes
-- First, determine diabetes and prediabetes status for the current cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_diabetes_prediabetes_flags AS
SELECT
  i."respondent_sequence_number",
  (
    f."glycohemoglobin" >= 6.5 OR
    f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" >= 126 OR
    f."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes' OR
    f."taking_insulin_now" = 'Yes'
  ) AS is_diabetes,
  (
    (f."glycohemoglobin" >= 5.7 AND f."glycohemoglobin" <= 6.4) OR
    (f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" >= 100 AND f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" <= 125) OR
    f."ever_told_you_have_prediabetes" = 'Yes'
  ) AS is_prediabetes
FROM temp_exclusion_step5 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Now, apply the exclusion: keep only those with diabetes OR prediabetes
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step6 AS
SELECT dp."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_diabetes_prediabetes_flags dp
WHERE dp.is_diabetes = TRUE OR dp.is_prediabetes = TRUE;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step6;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Covariate: Age at screening
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_at_screening AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  f."age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Covariate: Gender
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Covariate: Race/Hispanic origin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  f."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Predictor: SHR
-- Calculate raw SHR value
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_shr_raw AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  (f."fasting_glucose_mmol_l" / (1.59 * f."glycohemoglobin" - 2.59)) AS "shr_value"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE (1.59 * f."glycohemoglobin" - 2.59) != 0; -- Avoid division by zero

-- Compute quartile cutoffs for SHR within cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_shr_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "shr_value") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "shr_value") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "shr_value") AS q3
FROM temp_shr_raw;

-- Assign SHR quartile group
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_shr_quartiles AS
SELECT
  s."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN s."shr_value" IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN s."shr_value" <= (SELECT q1 FROM temp_shr_cutoffs) THEN 'Q1: <=25%'
    WHEN s."shr_value" <= (SELECT q2 FROM temp_shr_cutoffs) THEN 'Q2: >25% and <=50%'
    WHEN s."shr_value" <= (SELECT q3 FROM temp_shr_cutoffs) THEN 'Q3: >50% and <=75%'
    ELSE 'Q4: >75%'
  END AS "shr"
FROM temp_shr_raw s;

-- 4.5 Outcome: Months follow up examination (time-to-event)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_months_follow_up_examination AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  f."months_followup_examination" AS "months_follow_up_examination"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.6 Outcome: All-cause mortality (event indicator)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_cause_mortality AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  f."mortality_status" AS "all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  tas."age_at_screening",
  tg."gender",
  trho."race_hispanic_origin",
  tsq."shr",
  tmfe."months_follow_up_examination",
  tacm."all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_age_at_screening tas ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tas."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_gender tg ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tg."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin trho ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = trho."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_shr_quartiles tsq ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tsq."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_months_follow_up_examination tmfe ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tmfe."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_all_cause_mortality tacm ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tacm."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

-- STEP: Create merged final table with design variables + in_analysis flag
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_final_with_weights;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_with_weights AS
SELECT 
    wd."respondent_sequence_number",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_psu",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_stratum",
    wd."survey_weight",
    CASE WHEN ft."respondent_sequence_number" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "in_analysis",
    ft."age_at_screening",
    ft."gender",
    ft."race_hispanic_origin",
    ft."shr",
    ft."months_follow_up_examination",
    ft."all_cause_mortality"
FROM weight_design wd
LEFT JOIN temp_final_table ft
  ON wd."respondent_sequence_number" = ft."respondent_sequence_number";

Question:
We will plan to perform a weighted Cox regression for NHANES data from 2005-2018.
Participants will be excluded if have missing data on any of the following: fasting plasma glucose (mmol/L) or glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%) or months follow up examination or mortality status or age at screening was less than 20 years old.
They will also be excluded if they don't have diabetes or prediabetes when they are defined as the following:
diabetes defined as meeting any of these: glycohemoglobin (%)>=6.5 or fasting plasma glucose >=126 mg/dl, doctor told you have diabetes yes or taking inculin now yes.
prediabtes defined as meeting any of these: glycohemoglobin (%) >=5.7 less or equal to 6.4 fasting plasma glucose level between 100-125 mg/dl or yes to do you have prediabetes.
Main predictor is SHR - which is fasting plasma glucose (mmol/l)/ (1.59* glycohemoglobin (%)-2.59), categorized as quartiles, categorized in quartiles(%) Q1: <=25, Q2: >25 and <=50, Q3: >50 and <=75, Q4: >75.
The analysis will employ a weighted Cox proportional hazards regression model and covariates will include age at screening, gender, race/Hispanic origin.
The main outcome is all-cause mortality with months followup examination serving as the time-to-event variable.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: weighted cox regression

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 2005-2018

Inclusion Criteria:
None

Exclusion Criteria:
- missing fasting plasma glucose (mmol/L)
- missing glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%)
- missing months follow up examination
- missing mortality status
- age at screening < 20 years old
- NOT (diabetes OR prediabetes) where:
  diabetes is defined as:
    glycohemoglobin (%) >= 6.5 OR fasting plasma glucose >= 126 mg/dl OR doctor told you have diabetes = yes OR taking inculin now = yes
  prediabetes is defined as:
    (glycohemoglobin (%) >= 5.7 AND glycohemoglobin (%) <= 6.4) OR (fasting plasma glucose level >= 100 mg/dl AND fasting plasma glucose level <= 125 mg/dl) OR do you have prediabetes = yes

Covariates:
- age at screening
- gender
- race/Hispanic origin

Predictor:
- SHR calculated as:
  fasting plasma glucose (mmol/l) / (1.59 * glycohemoglobin (%) - 2.59)
  categorized into quartiles:
    Q1: <=25%
    Q2: >25% and <=50%
    Q3: >50% and <=75%
    Q4: >75%

Outcome:
- time-to-event: months follow up examination
- event indicator: all-cause mortality (1 for event, 0 for censored)

-- STEP 1: Create temp_master_weight

-- TEMP TABLE FOR weight
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_weight;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_weight AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_d
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_e
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_f
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_g
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_h
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_i
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_j
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL;


-- STEP 2: Create temp_psu_stratum

-- TEMP TABLE FOR PSU and Stratum
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_psu_stratum;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_psu_stratum AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_i
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_j;


-- STEP 3: Create final weight+design table
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS weight_design;
CREATE TABLE weight_design AS
SELECT 
    s.respondent_sequence_number,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_stratum,
    w.survey_weight
FROM temp_psu_stratum s
INNER JOIN temp_master_weight w
  ON s.respondent_sequence_number = w.respondent_sequence_number;

-- ALL UNIQUE PATIENT IDs
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_all_ids;

UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_glycohemoglobin
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_months_followup_examination
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_mortality_status
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_fasting_glucose_mg_dl
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_taking_insulin_now
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_ever_told_you_have_prediabetes
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_gender
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_race_hispanic_origin;

-- Add index to the main ID table for the final join
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_all_ids_respondent_sequence_number ON temp_all_ids (respondent_sequence_number);

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."fasting_glucose_mmol_l",
    t1."glycohemoglobin",
    t2."months_followup_examination",
    t3."mortality_status",
    t4."age_in_years_at_screening",
    t5."fasting_glucose_mg_dl",
    t6."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t7."taking_insulin_now",
    t8."ever_told_you_have_prediabetes",
    t9."gender",
    t10."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_fasting_glucose_mmol_l t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_glycohemoglobin t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_months_followup_examination t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_mortality_status t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_fasting_glucose_mg_dl t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t6 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t6.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_taking_insulin_now t7 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t7.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_ever_told_you_have_prediabetes t8 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t8.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_gender t9 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t9.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_race_hispanic_origin t10 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t10.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);


-- Clean up final_master_table
DELETE FROM final_master_table
WHERE respondent_sequence_number NOT IN (
    SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM weight_design
);


-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes all patients from final_master_table as no specific inclusion criteria are provided.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table;

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude patients with missing fasting plasma glucose (mmol/l)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."fasting_glucose_mmol_l" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude patients with missing glycohemoglobin (%)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."glycohemoglobin" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude patients with missing months follow up examination
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."months_followup_examination" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude patients with missing mortality status
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."mortality_status" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.5: Exclude patients where age at screening was less than 20 years old
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step5 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_in_years_at_screening" >= 20;

-- STEP 2.6: Exclude patients who do not have diabetes or prediabetes
-- Sub-step 2.6.1: Determine diabetes status
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_diabetes_status AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number",
       CASE
           WHEN f."glycohemoglobin" >= 6.5
             OR f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" >= 126
             OR f."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes'
             OR f."taking_insulin_now" = 'Yes'
           THEN TRUE
           ELSE FALSE
       END AS "has_diabetes"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Sub-step 2.6.2: Determine prediabetes status
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_prediabetes_status AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number",
       CASE
           WHEN (f."glycohemoglobin" >= 5.7 AND f."glycohemoglobin" <= 6.4)
             OR (f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" >= 100 AND f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" <= 125)
             OR f."ever_told_you_have_prediabetes" = 'Yes'
           THEN TRUE
           ELSE FALSE
       END AS "has_prediabetes"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Sub-step 2.6.3: Combine diabetes and prediabetes status
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_combined_condition AS
SELECT d."respondent_sequence_number",
       CASE
           WHEN d."has_diabetes" IS TRUE OR p."has_prediabetes" IS TRUE
           THEN TRUE
           ELSE FALSE
       END AS "combined_condition_present"
FROM temp_diabetes_status d
JOIN temp_prediabetes_status p ON d."respondent_sequence_number" = p."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Sub-step 2.6.4: Apply the exclusion (keep only those with diabetes OR prediabetes)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step6 AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_combined_condition c
WHERE c."combined_condition_present" IS TRUE;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step6;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Covariate: age at screening
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_at_screening AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Covariate: gender
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Covariate: race/hispanic origin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Predictor: SHR
-- Calculate raw SHR values
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_shr_raw AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       (f."fasting_glucose_mmol_l" / (1.59 * f."glycohemoglobin" - 2.59)) AS "shr_value"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Compute quartile cutoffs for SHR within cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_shr_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "shr_value") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "shr_value") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "shr_value") AS q3
FROM temp_shr_raw;

-- Assign SHR quartile group labels
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_shr_quartiles AS
SELECT s."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN s."shr_value" IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN s."shr_value" <= (SELECT q1 FROM temp_shr_cutoffs) THEN 'Q1: <=25%'
    WHEN s."shr_value" <= (SELECT q2 FROM temp_shr_cutoffs) THEN 'Q2: >25% and <=50%'
    WHEN s."shr_value" <= (SELECT q3 FROM temp_shr_cutoffs) THEN 'Q3: >50% and <=75%'
    ELSE 'Q4: >75%'
  END AS "shr"
FROM temp_shr_raw s;

-- 4.5 Outcome: months follow up examination
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_months_follow_up_examination AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."months_followup_examination"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.6 Outcome: all-cause mortality
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_cause_mortality AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       CASE
           WHEN f."mortality_status" = 1.0 THEN '1'
           WHEN f."mortality_status" = 0.0 THEN '0'
           ELSE NULL
       END AS "all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  tae."age_at_screening",
  tg."gender",
  trho."race_hispanic_origin",
  tsq."shr",
  tmfe."months_followup_examination",
  tacm."all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_age_at_screening tae ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tae."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_gender tg ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tg."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin trho ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = trho."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_shr_quartiles tsq ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tsq."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_months_follow_up_examination tmfe ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tmfe."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_all_cause_mortality tacm ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tacm."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

-- STEP: Create merged final table with design variables + in_analysis flag
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_final_with_weights;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_with_weights AS
SELECT 
    wd."respondent_sequence_number",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_psu",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_stratum",
    wd."survey_weight",
    CASE WHEN ft."respondent_sequence_number" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "in_analysis",
    ft."age_at_screening",
    ft."gender",
    ft."race_hispanic_origin",
    ft."shr",
    ft."months_followup_examination",
    ft."all_cause_mortality"
FROM weight_design wd
LEFT JOIN temp_final_table ft
  ON wd."respondent_sequence_number" = ft."respondent_sequence_number";

Question:
We will plan to perform a weighted Cox regression for NHANES data from 2005-2018.
Participants will be excluded if have missing data on any of the following: fasting plasma glucose (mmol/L) or glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%) or months follow up examination or mortality status or age at screening was less than 20 years old.
They will also be excluded if they don't have diabetes or prediabetes when they are defined as the following:
diabetes defined as meeting any of these: glycohemoglobin (%)>=6.5 or fasting plasma glucose >=126 mg/dl, doctor told you have diabetes yes or taking inculin now yes.
prediabtes defined as meeting any of these: glycohemoglobin (%) >=5.7 less or equal to 6.4 fasting plasma glucose level between 100-125 mg/dl or yes to do you have prediabetes.
Main predictor is SHR - which is fasting plasma glucose (mmol/l)/ (1.59* glycohemoglobin (%)-2.59), categorized as quartiles, categorized in quartiles(%) Q1: <=25, Q2: >25 and <=50, Q3: >50 and <=75, Q4: >75.
The analysis will employ a weighted Cox proportional hazards regression model and covariates will include age at screening, gender, race/Hispanic origin.
The main outcome is all-cause mortality with months followup examination serving as the time-to-event variable.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: weighted cox regression

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 2005-2018

Inclusion Criteria: None

Exclusion Criteria:
- missing fasting plasma glucose (mmol/L)
- missing glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%)
- missing months follow up examination
- missing mortality status
- age at screening < 20 years old
- participants who do not have diabetes or prediabetes, where:
    - diabetes is defined as: glycohemoglobin (%) >= 6.5 OR fasting plasma glucose >= 126 mg/dl OR doctor told you have diabetes = yes OR taking inculin now = yes
    - prediabetes is defined as: (glycohemoglobin (%) >= 5.7 AND glycohemoglobin (%) <= 6.4) OR (fasting plasma glucose >= 100 mg/dl AND fasting plasma glucose <= 125 mg/dl) OR do you have prediabetes = yes

Covariates:
- age at screening
- gender
- race/Hispanic origin

Predictor:
- SHR calculated as:
  fasting plasma glucose (mmol/l) / (1.59 * glycohemoglobin (%) - 2.59)
  categorized into quartiles:
    Q1: <=25%
    Q2: >25% and <=50%
    Q3: >50% and <=75%
    Q4: >75%

Outcome:
- time-to-event: months follow up examination
- event indicator: all-cause mortality (binary, 1 for event, 0 for censored)

-- STEP 1: Create temp_master_weight

-- TEMP TABLE FOR weight
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_weight;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_weight AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_d
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_e
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_f
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_g
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_h
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_i
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_j
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL;


-- STEP 2: Create temp_psu_stratum

-- TEMP TABLE FOR PSU and Stratum
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_psu_stratum;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_psu_stratum AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_i
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_j;


-- STEP 3: Create final weight+design table
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS weight_design;
CREATE TABLE weight_design AS
SELECT 
    s.respondent_sequence_number,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_stratum,
    w.survey_weight
FROM temp_psu_stratum s
INNER JOIN temp_master_weight w
  ON s.respondent_sequence_number = w.respondent_sequence_number;




-- TEMP TABLE FOR "fasting plasma glucose (mmol/l)", "fasting plasma glucose (mmol/l)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_fasting_glucose_mmol_l;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_fasting_glucose_mmol_l AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "fasting_glucose_mmol_l" AS "fasting_glucose_mmol_l"
FROM nhanes.glu_d
UNION ALL

FROM nhanes.glu_f
UNION ALL

UNION ALL

FROM nhanes.glu_j;

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."fasting_glucose_mmol_l",
    t1."glycohemoglobin",
    t2."months_followup_examination",
    t3."mortality_status",
    t4."age_in_years_at_screening",
    t5."fasting_glucose_mg_dl",
    t6."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t7."taking_insulin_now",
    t8."ever_told_you_have_prediabetes",
    t9."gender",
    t10."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_fasting_glucose_mmol_l t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_glycohemoglobin t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_months_followup_examination t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_mortality_status t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_fasting_glucose_mg_dl t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t6 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t6.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_taking_insulin_now t7 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t7.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_ever_told_you_have_prediabetes t8 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t8.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_gender t9 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t9.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_race_hispanic_origin t10 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t10.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);


-- Clean up final_master_table
DELETE FROM final_master_table
WHERE respondent_sequence_number NOT IN (
    SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM weight_design
);


-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes all patients from final_master_table as no specific inclusion criteria were provided.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table;

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude patients with missing fasting plasma glucose (mmol/l)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."fasting_glucose_mmol_l" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude patients with missing glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."glycohemoglobin" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude patients with missing months follow up examination
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."months_followup_examination" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude patients with missing mortality status
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."mortality_status" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.5: Exclude patients where age at screening was less than 20 years old
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step5 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_in_years_at_screening" >= 20;

-- STEP 2.6: Exclude participants who do not have diabetes or prediabetes
-- STEP 2.6.1: Calculate diabetes_status
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_diabetes_status AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."glycohemoglobin" >= 6.5
      OR f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" >= 126
      OR f."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes'
      OR f."taking_insulin_now" = 'Yes'
    THEN TRUE
    ELSE FALSE
  END AS "diabetes_status"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5 c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 2.6.2: Calculate prediabetes_status
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_prediabetes_status AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN (f."glycohemoglobin" >= 5.7 AND f."glycohemoglobin" <= 6.4)
      OR (f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" >= 100 AND f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" <= 125)
      OR f."ever_told_you_have_prediabetes" = 'Yes'
    THEN TRUE
    ELSE FALSE
  END AS "prediabetes_status"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5 c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 2.6.3: Calculate has_diabetes_or_prediabetes
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_has_diabetes_or_prediabetes AS
SELECT
  ds."respondent_sequence_number",
  (ds."diabetes_status" OR ps."prediabetes_status") AS "has_diabetes_or_prediabetes"
FROM temp_diabetes_status ds
JOIN temp_prediabetes_status ps ON ds."respondent_sequence_number" = ps."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 2.6.4: Exclude participants who do not have diabetes or prediabetes (i.e., keep only those who DO have diabetes or prediabetes)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step6 AS
SELECT h."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_has_diabetes_or_prediabetes h
WHERE h."has_diabetes_or_prediabetes" = TRUE;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step6;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Covariate: Age at screening
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_at_screening AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  f."age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Covariate: Gender
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Covariate: Race/Hispanic origin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  f."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Predictor: SHR
-- Calculate raw SHR from inputs for cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_shr_raw AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  (f."fasting_glucose_mmol_l" / (1.59 * f."glycohemoglobin" - 2.59)) AS "shr_value"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE (1.59 * f."glycohemoglobin" - 2.59) != 0; -- Avoid division by zero

-- Compute quartile cutoffs for SHR within cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_shr_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "shr_value") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "shr_value") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "shr_value") AS q3
FROM temp_shr_raw;

-- Assign SHR quartile group
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_shr_quartiles AS
SELECT
  s."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN s."shr_value" IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN s."shr_value" <= (SELECT q1 FROM temp_shr_cutoffs) THEN 'Q1: <=25%'
    WHEN s."shr_value" <= (SELECT q2 FROM temp_shr_cutoffs) THEN 'Q2: >25% and <=50%'
    WHEN s."shr_value" <= (SELECT q3 FROM temp_shr_cutoffs) THEN 'Q3: >50% and <=75%'
    ELSE 'Q4: >75%'
  END AS "shr"
FROM temp_shr_raw s;

-- 4.5 Outcome: Months follow up examination
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_months_follow_up_examination AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  f."months_followup_examination" AS "months_follow_up_examination"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.6 Outcome: All-cause mortality
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_cause_mortality AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  f."mortality_status" AS "all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  tas."age_at_screening",
  tg."gender",
  trho."race_hispanic_origin",
  tsq."shr",
  tmfe."months_follow_up_examination",
  tacm."all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
LEFT JOIN temp_age_at_screening tas ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tas."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_gender tg ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tg."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin trho ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = trho."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_shr_quartiles tsq ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tsq."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_months_follow_up_examination tmfe ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tmfe."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_all_cause_mortality tacm ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tacm."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

-- STEP: Create merged final table with design variables + in_analysis flag
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_final_with_weights;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_with_weights AS
SELECT 
    wd."respondent_sequence_number",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_psu",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_stratum",
    wd."survey_weight",
    CASE WHEN ft."respondent_sequence_number" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "in_analysis",
    ft."age_at_screening",
    ft."gender",
    ft."race_hispanic_origin",
    ft."shr",
    ft."months_follow_up_examination",
    ft."all_cause_mortality"
FROM weight_design wd
LEFT JOIN temp_final_table ft
  ON wd."respondent_sequence_number" = ft."respondent_sequence_number";
